# FluffyStuff Riichi Mahjong Tiles

Source: https://github.com/FluffyStuff/riichi-mahjong-tiles

Author: FluffyStuff

License: Public domain / CC0 1.0

License file: `LICENSE.md`

Imported files:

- `Export/Regular/Man1.png` through `Man9.png`
- `Export/Regular/Pin1.png` through `Pin9.png`
- `Export/Regular/Sou1.png` through `Sou9.png`
- `Export/Regular/Front.png`

The Android app copies these individual 600x800 PNG tile images into
`app/src/main/res/drawable-nodpi/` as `tile_man_*.png`, `tile_pin_*.png`,
`tile_sou_*.png`, and `tile_front.png`. These are not
cropped from a sprite sheet.
